name: Pumpkin Pie with Ginger Cookie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first eight ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Beat at medium speed with a mixer until well combined.
3. Coat a 9-inch pie plate with vegetable spray.
4. Line the bottom of the pie plate with crumbled gingersnap crumbs.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce the temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake an additional 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
8. Sprinkle with additional cookie crumbs.
9. Serve with reduced-fat whipped cream or fat-free frozen yogurt.
